mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cf_recurring (id, user_id, account_book_id, asset_account_id, category_id, type, amount, remark, start_date, end_date, frequency, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{accountBookId}, #{assetAccountId}, #{categoryId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{frequency}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cf_recurring WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_date DESC
